title: Four Gene Sequence Mutations Correlate With High Gastric Cancer Mortality Rates
summary: Investigators have identified four genes with mutations linked to the development and progression of gastric cancers.

title: Lisa Mosconi, neuroscientist: ‘Menopause is making women feel less valuable than before’
summary: One of the most influential scientists according to ‘The Times’ has published an essay on menopause and the brain. The researcher says the bulk of studies on this topic have been conducted on white women

title: Doing this when you sleep could be an early warning sign for deadly high blood pressure and stroke
summary: The study, published in the Nature Digital Medicine journal, is the first to use multiple night home-based monitoring technologies over an extended period to investigate the link between snoring and blood pressure.

title: Mango: Health Benefits, Nutrition and Recipe Ideas
summary: Mangos are packed with nutrients that support your overall health. Read along to discover the health benefits of mangoes revealed by dietitians.

title: I beat colon cancer at 33 against the odds. Doctors dismissed the warning signs... what I now know could save your life
summary: Marisa Peters, a 43-year-old mother-of-three from California, was diagnosed with stage 3 colon cancer at age 39. She is now teaching other young patients how to avoid the disease.

title: What is ‘Ozempic mouth’? Shocking side effect of weight loss drug seen in these Hollywood celebs
summary: A new side effect known as “Ozempic mouth” may be affecting some Hollywood stars using the weight loss drug.

title: How you walk could be a sign of early Alzheimer's disease
summary: A new study has suggested that individuals with early Alzheimer's disease struggle while walking - a sign that could help with early diagnosis

title: My GP told me that my stomach pains were just constipation. It turned out to be incurable ovarian cancer - and here are symptoms the medics ignored 'because I was so young'
summary: It was during a dream solo three-month trip to the Bahamas in July 2022 that Louisa Lloyd realised something was seriously wrong.

title: From green bananas to a glass of milk, the simple diet tweaks PROVEN to cut the chances of bowel cancer, as experts reveal the cheap daily supplement that can reduce risk by 58pc
summary: Nearly 17,000 people die from bowel cancer each year - and while around 5 per cent are aged 25 to 49, that figure is steadily rising. Here are simple ways to reduce your risk of developing it...

title: Supplement warning as doctor says vitamin could damage heart and kidneys
summary: As is the case with any medication or supplement, taking too much of this vitamin could be harmful.
